http://www.bittiming.can-wiki.info/

Type: bxCAN, Clock: 45MHz, max brp: 1024, SP: 87.5%, min tq: 8, max tq: 25, FD factor: undefined, SJW: 1



Bit	accuracy	Pre-	Number	Seg 1	Seg 2	Sample	CAN_BTR
Rate			scaler	Time q			Point at
